blog_title: Tiruppur to Delhi T-Shirt Transport Cost ₹25 — Real Supply Chain Breakdown for Bulk Buyers
caption:
₹25 moves a t-shirt 2,500 km — but here's what manufacturers won't tell you 🚛

You pay ₹40-50 per piece by courier for 500 units. We pay ₹20-25 per piece because one truck carries 8,000-10,000 pieces at once. Everything happens within 20 km in Tiruppur — knitting, dyeing, stitching. One ₹2.5L truck bill split across 10,000 tees = that ₹25 magic number.

Small orders = dead weight. Big volume = logistics wins the game.

Save this if you're sourcing your next bulk run 👇
